name: config-get
description: Contains details about a security configuration.

latestVersion.description: __Read-only__ The latest version of the security configuration.

productionHostnames.description: __Read-only__ The list of hostnames protected by this security configuration in the production network.

productionVersion.description: __Read-only__ The latest security configuration version active in the production network.

stagingVersion.description: __Read-only__ The latest security configuration version active in the staging network.
